extra.reason: Added TldrConfig, EmbeddingConfig, SemanticConfig serde structs in tldr-core/src/config.rs with serde(default) on all fields, no deny_unknown_fields. from_str + from_path (returns default on missing file). 7 unit tests: empty {}, partial, unknown-keys-ignored, full cloud-shaped, missing file, malformed JSON, semantic disabled.

Updated CLAUDE.md with build commands, diagnostic tools section (tldr doctor --install), architecture overview, and conventions. INSTALL.md already had the optional tools section; SETUP.md already mentions tldr doctor. The gap was agent instructions not surfacing these capabilities.

Added merge() method for deep per-field merge (project wins over global), resolve() method that loads ~/.tldr/config.json then <project>/.tldr/config.json with deep merge. 5 tests: project-overrides-global, preserves-unset-fields, semantic-disabled-wins, all-absent-defaults, no-project-root.

Added EmbeddingModel::parse() and EmbeddingModel::resolve() to tldr-core. resolve() implements precedence: CLI flag > config embedding.model > built-in default. Provider seam: fails fast with clear message when provider != local. Removed 3 duplicated parse_model() functions from embed.rs, semantic.rs, similar.rs; replaced with config-aware EmbeddingModel::resolve().

All sub-tasks complete: TldrConfig structs (qw2), config loader with precedence chain (hzv), and embedder wiring with provider seam (5xn). Per-project .tldr/config.json is now supported with global ~/.tldr/config.json fallback and deep merge. CLI flag > project config > global config > built-in default. Cloud provider fails fast with clear error.

Annotated 7 files with 11 grep-able // TLDR-AUDIT(<id>): comments capturing the investigation (cs5 dead stub, 4er unwired hybrid, 7kf/k4q/8pt regressions, 1a8 misnomer, 6fm root-cause). cargo check passes, 0 errors. Comments only, no logic changes.
Eval harness built + baseline captured (R@5=0.143, MRR=0.086). Measurement vehicle for Phase 1.

Arctic query prefix shipped in e9e5427 (embedder.rs embed_query + EmbeddingModel::query_prefix), default-ON via TLDR_QUERY_PREFIX. Full-scale eval verdict: recall@5 0.071->0.857, MRR 0.083->0.685 on crates/tldr-core/src. Decisive win, stays default-on.

Enrichment wired into SemanticIndex::build + per-function re-parse quadratic fixed (reuses extract_cfg_from_tree/extract_dfg_from_tree_with_cfg), shipped 37ab719+e9e5427. Gated OFF by default (TLDR_ENRICH) because at semantic/ scope enrichment did NOT help recall (MRR 0.875->0.708 w/ CFG/DFG). Module now compiled (mod decl added) + embed_schema_version pins raw-v1 vs enriched-v1 cache keys.

DECIDED: usearch (C++ dep accepted). The mmap-vs-usearch fork is resolved in favor of usearch — exact_search_f32 + view + save/load + ScalarKind. GC = reachability-on-full-reindex. Unblocks the (reframed) impl children.

SUPERSEDED by usearch decision (TLDR-rgc, 2026-06-01). usearch exact_search_f32 owns the vector scan — exact, SIMD-accelerated in C++. Also moot per ac0 measurement (scan was 0.1ms, never the bottleneck). No custom SIMD/ANN needed.
SUPERSEDED by usearch decision (TLDR-rgc). Quantization is built into usearch via ScalarKind (add_f32/f16/i8/b1x8) — opt-in if a size problem ever arises. No custom quant code needed.

SUPERSEDED by usearch decision (TLDR-rgc). usearch save/load + view (binary mmap) replaces the JSON cache — kills the 4.3s parse. Old 1.1GB cache.json is dead weight, discarded on migration (TLDR-3gj).

SUPERSEDED by usearch decision (TLDR-rgc). usearch defines the on-disk index format + abstraction; no custom MmapVectorStore format to design. Residual (thin wrapper + metadata sidecar) folded into reframed TLDR-l5d.
ACCEPTED (ADR record, 2026-06-01). Decision is final and recorded; closing so it stays a durable, queryable record without sitting in the active work queue. Reopen only if the decision is revisited.

Default semantic threshold 0.5->0.0 (rank top-N, no cutoff) so the prefix-regime scores (~0.46) are no longer hidden; also fixed the formatter's hardcoded 0.50 display to show the actual threshold. PROVEN: 'tldr semantic <q>' with default settings now returns cosine_similarity instead of 'No matches'. semantic.rs.

semantic_eval now resolves the deployed model via TldrConfig::resolve (matches the CLI), with TLDR_EVAL_MODEL override, instead of the hardcoded EmbeddingModel::default() (ArcticM). Eval now benchmarks the model users actually run (e.g. ArcticL). semantic_eval.rs.
Renamed misleading CLI flag --hybrid -> --filter (it is BM25 + regex post-filter, NOT lexical+dense fusion). --hybrid reserved for real RRF fusion (TLDR-4er). search.rs.
ACCEPTED (ADR, 2026-06-01). Model-size measured and ruled out as a quality lever; ArcticL retained as deployed default. Recorded so future sessions don't re-chase a bigger encoder.

Dead EmbeddingClient HTTP stub DELETED (search/embedding_client.rs + types.rs placeholder + mod/lib re-exports + tests). hybrid_search decoupled from any embedding backend — now takes &[SemanticResult] supplied by the caller. Full workspace builds green.

RRF hybrid fusion WIRED end-to-end. hybrid_search decoupled from the dead stub (cs5); new hybrid_search_with_index builds dense from in-process SemanticIndex, reduces to best-per-file, RRF-fuses with BM25. Wired into BOTH consumers: 'tldr semantic --hybrid' CLI + MCP tldr_semantic tool (was BM25-only). Fixed a path-key bug (dense=cwd-relative vs BM25=root-relative -> overlap always 0; now strip root so fusion actually combines). MEASURED (ArcticL, prefix ON, n=14): dense->hybrid Recall@5 0.786->0.929, Recall@10 0.929->1.000, MRR 0.718->0.783; cfg/extractor.rs recovered (— -> rank 8). Eval measures the exact production path. Caveat: file-level fusion; n=14 (see 6h3). Full build green, 31/31 search tests pass.

DONE (2026-06-02, commits a7479f4->0bebf51 + harness). usearch VectorStore is feature-complete + tested (16 unit tests): key->vector index + ChunkMeta sidecar + FileRecord per-file index + Manifest; crash-safe generation/CURRENT save with manifest-gated load + checksums + GC; stable identity->u64 key scheme w/ ordinal disambiguation; from_embedded + build() (chunk_code+Embedder reusing EmbeddingCache for content-dedup). EQUIVALENCE PROVEN on n=52 real data: 39/52 byte-identical top-10 + 13/52 tie-only (exact cosine determinism => divergence iff tie). New honest baseline R@5 0.750 / R@10 0.827 / MRR 0.599. ss3-class root_relative hardened. usearch C++/cxx dep de-risked + Cargo.lock'd. REMAINING (now unblocked): m01 = rewire CLI/daemon EmbeddingCache/SemanticIndex onto this store (the seam-switch where the 1.4GB->58MB / 2.3GB->0.5GB wins land); t8f = incremental deltas; ccg = i8; zr6 = filtered search.

Accepted after local n=52 eval verification: usearch VectorStore exact-search path has REAL divergences=0 and is equivalent modulo ties/epsilon (52/52); dense baseline captured; crash-safe persistence/build/sidecar steps already committed.

FIXED 2026-06-02 (commits 987af50 + 2d72df2). The silent strip_prefix raw-path fallback is hardened in BOTH locations: vector_store.rs root_relative (987af50) and cache.rs CacheKey::from_chunk via key_rel_path (2d72df2). Pattern: lexical strip -> canonical strip -> canonical-absolute (warned) -> raw (warned) — never a silent revert to the absolute-vs-relative divergence. Empty key_root (default/tests) still lexically matches -> full path unchanged. cache+vector_store tests pass.

RESOLVED in m01 PR1 (commit d874b77). store_search::manifest_id_for now builds a REAL ManifestId via ManifestId::for_build(model, root, chunk_params_tag(opts), CHUNK_WALKER_VERSION): model_revision/dimensions/embed_schema were already real (embed_schema_tag reads TLDR_ENRICH); the two placeholders (chunk_params, walker_version) are now wired — chunk_params_tag = gran+sorted-langs, CHUNK_WALKER_VERSION='w1' (a single bump-on-chunking-change const). Unit-tested by manifest_id_reflects_model_and_chunk_inputs (model/granularity/language change all flip identity -> LoadFail::Incompatible -> rebuild). Codex-verified (no enrich staleness hole).

Equivalence GATE PROVEN (the stated pass/fail). semantic_eval store-equivalence harness (TLDR_EVAL_STORE=1) diffs usearch exact_search_f32 vs dense top_k_similar over n=52 gold: 52/52 equivalent, REAL=0, EPSILON=0, UNPROVEN=0 (2026-06-02), confirmed across 3 Codex passes. Removed the stale 2a4->m01 dependency: equivalence was verified DIRECTLY (VectorStore vs SemanticIndex) and did NOT require the m01 production rewire. Secondary cold-latency capture (JSON-load vs store-load) folded into TLDR-zxb (measurable only once the store serves production).

Gold-set expansion DONE. semantic_eval GOLD is now 52 cases (was 14) spanning ast/cfg/dfg/callgraph/search/security/quality/semantic subsystems, easy + modality-gap queries (semantic_eval.rs:28-294, comment credits TLDR-6h3). Acceptance met: >=50 cases (52); single-query swing = 1/52 = 0.019 < 0.02. Latest run (2026-06-02): R@5 0.750, R@10 0.827, MRR 0.599. The remaining acceptance clause ('measure 4er/9m2 lifts exceeding single-case noise') is a USE of this now-stable harness by those features when they land (TLDR-4er hybrid, TLDR-9m2 descriptions) — not remaining work on the gold set itself.

DONE (commits 8a19b09 + TOCTOU fix). Corpus-digest freshness gate implemented, tested (pure: determinism/add/edit/delete/0-chunk-trap; e2e real-model: rebuild-only-on-drift), and Codex-reviewed: 4 CORRECT, Item 3 TOCTOU BUG fixed (digest snapshot before chunk), Item 7 docs fixed. Items 5 (call-site store-location guard) + 6 (per-query walk -> load/notify time) deferred to zxb where wiring handles them. store_search now rebuilds on source drift instead of serving stale rankings. Unblocks zxb.

FIXED (commit 1db1c08). SemanticIndex::find_similar now matches the caller's path against chunk paths via canonicalize_for_match (exact fast path -> canonical-form fallback), so 'tldr similar' works when the caller's path form (canonicalized in similar.rs) differs from the walker's stored chunk path. Self-exclusion now keys off the query chunk's OWN stored path. Stale test fixed to pass a real path; added find_similar_matches_despite_path_form_mismatch (covers the '/./' form-mismatch via the canonical fallback). Both find_similar tests pass with the model.

FIXED (commit 1db1c08). cli_tests.rs test_structure_json_output now asserts the actual 'definitions' key (the structure JSON groups function-level items under definitions + classes; no top-level 'functions'). Passes.

FIXED (test fix). The clone CONTENT was deterministic all along; clones_output_is_byte_stable only stripped stats.detection_time_ms (+ a non-existent 'metadata' key) and MISSED summary.detection_time_ms, so the unstripped wall-clock timing made the byte comparison fail. Now strips detection_time_ms recursively. 5/5 green. Stale test, not a product non-determinism bug.

Won't do: user committed to retaining usearch+glue + fully in-memory index (2026-06-02). LanceDB research (firecrawl) recorded the finding (exact kNN via bypass_vector_index, BYO-vectors boundary = Arrow RecordBatch, heavy arrow-58 dep tree, less-mature Rust SDK) but the decision is to stay on usearch. No migration spike needed.
Won't do: user committed to usearch+glue (2026-06-02). Qdrant Edge IS a real in-process Rust crate (overturned the server-only assumption) but irrelevant given the decision to stay on usearch.

Won't do: backend re-evaluation concluded by user decision (2026-06-02) to RETAIN usearch+glue and keep the index fully in-memory. The blind spot TLDR-uwb missed (embedded vector DBs) was researched: LanceDB (GO-capable, exact kNN, but heavy arrow deps + Arrow-RecordBatch glue + less-mature Rust SDK) and Qdrant Edge (real in-process crate). Decision: not worth the dependency weight + determinism re-validation to delete ~1100 lines of glue. usearch+glue stands.
Done — 6 comments corrected, compiles clean, Codex signed off. Uncommitted in working tree (user controls commit/push).

FIXED (interim, Codex before+after reviewed). handle_notify no longer locks the semantic_index std::sync::Mutex on the async path — moved to an awaited tokio::task::spawn_blocking (Arc::clone, poison-tolerant). Async worker no longer parked during an in-flight build. Ordering caveat + the ac0.2 superseding path documented inline. Build clean; 18 notify/daemon tests pass incl. test_semantic_index_invalidated_on_notify. Uncommitted in working tree (user controls commit/push). Full event-driven replacement remains TLDR-ac0.2.

FIXED (test-correction, not extractor). Root cause: the 2 tests asserted on the JSON 'methods' field, but methods AND functions are intentionally serde(skip_serializing) (types.rs:1276/1289, schema-cleanup-v1 BUG-13) — never in JSON for ANY language; method_infos is the sanctioned serialized surface. Elixir extraction was NOT broken: instrumented extract_from_tree returns functions=[bar,baz] and class Foo methods=[bar,baz] correctly, and method_infos JSON already had both with correct lines/signatures. NOTE: a Codex investigation proposed an extractor rewrite, but that was wrong for this symptom — it would not make the tests pass (panic is on get(methods), absent due to skip_serializing). Fix: updated the tests to assert on method_infos (names contain bar/baz; count==2) instead of the unserialized methods field; updated docstrings. 2 passed. Uncommitted in working tree.

FIXED. Replaced hardcoded /Users/cosimo/... path with env!(CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR) so the ignored dogfood test runs portably on this crate's own Rust source. Verified: test passes under --ignored (1 passed, 102s, real bugbot check). Uncommitted in working tree.

FIXED. find_similar's canonical fallback now memoizes canonicalize_for_match by path string (HashMap), so it canonicalizes once per UNIQUE file instead of once per chunk — O(files) syscalls not O(chunks). Behavior-preserving (pure memoization). Verified: both find_similar tests pass under --ignored incl. the path-form-mismatch fallback test. Uncommitted in working tree.
ACCEPTED (ADR record, 2026-06-02). Durable decision; closing so it stays queryable without sitting in the active work queue. Reopen only if revisited.

Decision recorded and linked to zxb + m01. Enforced in zxb implementation.

Done. SemanticIndex fallback removed from store_search.rs. Three public functions: search_with_store (cold CLI), load_or_build_store (daemon warm), query_store (daemon per-query). All errors propagate. 7/7 unit tests pass, build clean.
Done. CLI dense-only path wired to search_with_store(). store_dir_for() added to tldr-core for shared daemon/CLI path resolution. Hybrid stays on SemanticIndex (zxb.5). Build clean, no warnings.
Done. embed.rs rewired to load_or_build_store(). Removed manual chunk/cache/embedder flow, --include-vectors flag (vectors in store). Build clean.

Done. Daemon semantic_index (Mutex<Option<SemanticIndex>>) replaced with semantic_store (Mutex<Option<(EmbeddingModel, VectorStore)>>). Warm uses load_or_build_store (near-instant on fresh store). Query uses query_store against resident store. Notify clears the slot. Build clean.

Warm path ships VectorStore — load_or_build_store is near-instant on fresh store. Daemon holds resident (Model, VectorStore). Remaining improvements (incremental delta, watcher, concurrent reads) are separate issues (t8f, ac0.2, ac0.1).
Core goal achieved: VectorStore is the production search path (PR1 store_search helper + PR2 zxb wiring). EmbeddingCache format migration to follow in TLDR-3gj.
